body.purpose: All UI text, table cells, chart labels

label.purpose: Section headings, form labels, column headers

shadows.name: none
shadows.purpose: Shadows are prohibited per The Flat By Default Rule

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action button with cyan border, hover inverts to cyan fill.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: transparent; color: #22d3ee; border: 1px solid #22d3ee; padding: 8px 16px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease-out, color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #22d3ee; color: #0b0f1a; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #22d3ee; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Subtle action with thin cyan border at 30% opacity.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #22d3ee; border: 1px solid rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.3); padding: 4px 12px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.1); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #22d3ee; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Dark terminal-style input with stroke border, cyan focus.
components.css: .ds-input { background: #0b0f1a; border: 1px solid #334155; padding: 8px 12px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #f8fafc; border-radius: 0; width: 100%; transition: border-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #22d3ee; outline: none; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #9ca3af; } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Surface container with border separation, no shadow.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #111827; border: 1px solid #1e293b; padding: 16px; border-radius: 0; } .ds-card-label { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #9ca3af; margin-bottom: 4px; } .ds-card-value { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 500; color: #22d3ee; }

components.name: Table Header
components.description: Sortable table header with label typography and hover arrow.
components.html: Ticker ▲RMSER²
components.css: .ds-th { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #9ca3af; padding: 12px; text-align: left; border-bottom: 1px solid #1e293b; cursor: pointer; transition: color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-th:hover { color: #f8fafc; } .ds-th-num { text-align: right; }

narrative.overview:
A dark, focused data tool for volatility analysis. The design takes visual cues from Bloomberg terminals, developer consoles, and trading dashboards: high-density information, monospaced data, cyan-on-black signaling, and zero decoration. Everything serves the data.

The interface rejects SaaS pastels, rounded cards, gradient accents, and decorative illustration. It is not friendly in the conventional sense — it is efficient, precise, and rewards familiarity.
keyCharacteristics: Dark-on-dark color field with cyan signal color
Monospaced text throughout labels, data, and UI copy
Zero border-radius — hard edges consistent with terminal ethos
Sequential multi-ticker workflow with clear progress state
Straight borders, no shadows, no glass effects

rules.name: The Flat By Default Rule
rules.body: No shadows, no gradients, no glass effects. Depth is conveyed through tonal layering (Ink → Surface → border), not through elevation. Shadows are prohibited.

rules.name: The Mono Rule
rules.body: UI elements (labels, buttons, badges, tooltips) use IBM Plex Mono at 0.75rem, not the body size. This creates a consistent technical texture distinct from data values.

dos: Use cyan (#22d3ee) exclusively for interactive elements and the prediction line.
Use orange (#f97316) for actual values in charts.
Use hard 0px corners throughout — no border-radius anywhere.
Keep the dark field consistent — no light mode.
Use monospace for all UI text except the page title.
Show progress clearly during sequential multi-ticker operations.
Isolate errors per-ticker so partial results are still useful.
donts: Use rounded corners, shadows, gradients, or glass effects.
Use light gray text (#9ca3af) on dark backgrounds for body copy — bump to #d1d5db or brighter.
Add decorative motion or page-load animations.
Use display fonts in UI labels, buttons, or data.
Use card grids with identical icon-headline-body patterns.
Put side-stripe borders (colored left/right border > 1px) on cards or items.
Use uppercase tracked eyebrows above every section.
Use numbered section markers (01 / 02 / 03) as default scaffolding.
